mission_classes.name: PHYSICS_BENCHMARK
mission_classes.definition: Laboratory antimatter production, measurement, cooling, trapping, and fundamental-physics boundary.

mission_classes.name: CUSTODY_BENCHMARK
mission_classes.definition: Storage, trap continuity, transport boundary, custody receipts, and loss accounting.

mission_classes.name: CATALYZED_PROPULSION
mission_classes.definition: Antimatter as ignition, trigger, or catalyst for other propulsion systems, especially fusion.

mission_classes.name: DEEP_SPACE_PRECURSOR
mission_classes.definition: Outer-solar-system, heliopause, and very-deep-space mission architecture.

mission_classes.name: TWO_HUNDRED_FIFTY_AU_PROBE
mission_classes.definition: Bounded interstellar precursor mission class centered on approximately 250 AU targets.

mission_classes.name: INTERSTELLAR_PRECURSOR
mission_classes.definition: Multi-decade probe architectures beyond the solar gravity lens envelope and toward nearby-star precursor regimes.

mission_classes.name: RELATIVISTIC_STARFLIGHT
mission_classes.definition: Civilization-scale antimatter economy and propulsion architecture for relativistic interstellar travel.

classification_rule: Every mission claim must map to exactly one primary mission class and may not inherit claims from a higher class.
